name: sort
summary: Sắp xếp collection theo thứ tự. Stable vs unstable. Comparison-based: O(n log n) lower bound.

facts.text: stable sort: equal elements giữ relative order
comparison-based sorting: không thể nhanh hơn O(n log n) worst case
counting sort: O(n+k) — nhanh hơn khi key range nhỏ
Python/Java: Timsort — hybrid mergesort+insertion sort, O(n log n), stable
